# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that creates releases and publishes packages. On version tags, build the application, create a GitHub release, and publish to npm/PyPI. Make the release process fully automated so developers can just push tags to trigger releases.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Release Workflow

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*.*.*'

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v3
      with:
        node-version: '18.x'

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: npm install

    - name: Build application
      run: npm run build

  release:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Create GitHub Release
      uses: ncipollo/release-action@v1
      with:
        tag: ${{ github.ref }}
        name: Release ${{ github.ref }}
        commit: ${{ github.sha }}

  publish-npm:
    needs: release
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v3
      with:
        node-version: '18.x'
        registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org/'

    - name: Publish to npm
      env:
        NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}
      run: npm publish

  publish-pypi:
    needs: release
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Python
      uses: actions/setup-python@v4
      with:
        python-version: '3.x'

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: pip install wheel build twine

    - name: Build package
      run: python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel

    - name: Publish to PyPI
      env:
        TWINE_USERNAME: ${{ secrets.PYPI_USERNAME }}
        TWINE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.PYPI_PASSWORD }}
      run: twine upload dist/*
